title: 🎤 Music Player - Scream to Skip Ads (But You Can’t)
description: This is a submission for the DEV April Fools Challenge 🎤 Scream to Adjust volume or Skip Ads (But You Can’t) Because clearly, the problem with modern apps is that they don’t make you scream enough. I built a completely unnecessary, emotionally draining, and technically over-engineered web app where: You control volume by screaming into your microphone 👉 You get hit with ads you cannot skip Not because you don’t deserve control… Try it yourself (preferably not at 2AM near your family): 👉 [Try it yourself (preferably not at 2AM near your family): 👉 https://mic-driven-slider.vercel.app/](https://mic-driven-slider.vercel.app/) https://github.com/preeti-3/music-player This masterpiece of uselessness is powered by: React – for building a surprisingly serious UI Web Audio API – to detect how loud you scream Custom smoothing + noise filtering – so your fan doesn’t control the volume State machine logic – to decide when to ruin your experience with ads CSS animations – for glitch effects...
